strands.title: Project Context Shift: Hamutay vs Pichay
strands.content: CYCLE 41 CONTEXT SHIFT: Assistant has pivoted from intensive pichay/projector work (cycle 40) to exploration of a different project: hamutay. Directory listing shows minimal structure: README.md, docs/, main.py, pyproject.toml. This appears to be a sibling or alternate project in tony's workspace. IMPLICATION: Either (1) projector implementation is paused pending successful hamutay check, or (2) user is exploring dependencies/context before returning to pichay. The shift from pichay-specific work (JSONL parsing, tensor projection, 3-turn pilot) to generic project structure inspection suggests a context probe. pyproject.toml read is likely seeking: project name, version, dependencies, and entry points. CRITICAL OBSERVATION: This may be a distraction from the H0 projector MVP (cycle 40 actions incomplete?) or a necessary dependency resolution step.

key_claims.text: Assistant has shifted focus from pichay/projector (cycle 40) to hamutay project exploration
Hamutay directory contains minimal boilerplate: README.md, docs/, main.py, pyproject.toml (4 items, no obvious projector code)
Assistant is reading pyproject.toml to extract: project metadata (name, version), dependencies, and entry points
Pivot may indicate either context-gathering (dependency resolution) or paused pichay work pending hamutay clarity

strands.title: CYCLE 40 PROJECTOR WORK: Status and Carryover
strands.content: INCOMPLETE CYCLE 40 STATE: Prior tensor (cycle 40) outlined comprehensive MVP projector plan with 24 action items: parser module, claim extractor, strand assigner, epistemic assigner, tensor builder, 3-turn pilot integration test, full-file scaling. CRITICAL ACTIONS NOT YET CONFIRMED EXECUTED: (1) wc -l on proxy_*.jsonl (get line/turn count), (2) Read config.json, test_results.txt (run metadata), (3) Parse first 1-2 lines of session/*.jsonl to compare schema vs logs, (4) Pairwise JSONL parser implementation, (5) Metadata-based claim extractor heuristics, (6) Strand initialization logic, (7) Epistemic assignment rules, (8) TensorRecord builder, (9) 3-turn pilot integration test and acceptance checkpoint. QUESTION: Were any of these actions executed in parallel (not communicated)? If cycle 40 work was done silently, hamutay pivot makes sense (next phase). If not started, pivot is context-gathering or distraction. INFERRED STATE: As of end-of-cycle 40, no confirmed execution of projector skeleton code. Cycle 41 shift to hamutay may be intentional reframing or user decision to explore broader context.

key_claims.text: Cycle 40 planned 24+ action items for H0 projector MVP (parser, extractor, builder, 3-turn pilot); execution status unknown
Critical cycle 40 blockers: line count (wc -l), schema discovery (session/*.jsonl), config metadata not confirmed resolved
No evidence in cycle 41 content that 3-turn pilot, full-file run, or acceptance checkpoint v1 was executed
Cycle 41 hamutay pivot suggests either: (A) parallel execution of cycle 40 (hamutay is next phase), (B) context-gathering before resuming pichay, or (C) user-initiated distraction/scope shift

strands.title: Dual-Stream JSONL Schema (Consolidated from Cycle 40, Still Pending Validation)
strands.content: CYCLE 40 DISCOVERY (UNVALIDATED): JSONL log format confirmed as dual-stream (request/response pairs, lines 1/2, 3/4, 5/6, ...). Request line fields: type='request', timestamp, model, max_tokens, system (prompt metadata ~15K bytes), messages (role_counts, message_count, token counts, text_bytes, thinking_bytes). Response line fields: type='response_stream', timestamp, duration_ms, first_byte_ms, status_code, response_bytes, usage {input_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, output_tokens}. CRITICAL LIMITATION: Actual conversation TEXT content not visible in sampled JSONL peek (only metadata/byte counts). Hypothesis: full text may exist in session/*.jsonl or requires separate retrieval. CYCLE 41 STATUS: Schema discovery action (read first 1-2 lines of session/*.jsonl and compare vs logs) NOT YET EXECUTED. This is a MUST-DO before projector parser can finalize.

key_claims.text: JSONL dual-stream format confirmed (cycle 40): alternating request/response pairs, one JSON per line
Request JSON contains: type, timestamp, model, max_tokens, system, messages (metadata). Response JSON contains: type, timestamp, duration_ms, status_code, usage (tokens, cache stats).
Actual conversation TEXT is metadata-only in sampled logs (byte counts, not full text); may exist in session/*.jsonl
Schema discovery action (compare session/*.jsonl vs logs/*.jsonl) is UNRESOLVED; critical blocker for parser finalization

declared_losses.description: Cycle 40 outlined 24+ concrete action items (parser module, claim extractor, strand assigner, epistemic assigner, tensor builder, 3-turn pilot, full-file run, acceptance checkpoint). None of these actions report explicit completion in cycle 41 conversation. Dropped from active tracking until cycle 41 execution is clarified.
declared_losses.reason_for_loss: Context shift to hamutay project; pichay/projector work may have occurred in parallel (unlogged) or intentionally paused.

declared_losses.description: No projector skeleton code (parser.py, extractor.py, strand_assigner.py, etc.) has been generated or validated in conversation. Cycle 40 design documents and pseudocode exist, but no working Python modules confirmed.
declared_losses.reason_for_loss: Cycle 40 was planning phase, not implementation phase. Cycle 41 pivoted to hamutay before implementation could begin.

declared_losses.description: Critical blocker from cycle 40: 'Compare session vs logs schema. Read first 1-2 lines of session/*.jsonl and compare vs logs schema.' This action was marked IMMEDIATE but not executed. Cannot finalize parser design without knowing if session/*.jsonl has different/extended field structure.
declared_losses.reason_for_loss: Cycle 41 context shift to hamutay; schema discovery action was pre-empted.

declared_losses.description: Cycle 40 acceptance checkpoint required running projector on first 3 turns of proxy_*.jsonl and validating: (1) No crashes, (2) ≥3 strands, (3) ≥5 claims, (4) compression ratio ∈ [0.1, 0.5], (5) declared_losses > 0. This validation has not been attempted.
declared_losses.reason_for_loss: No projector code skeleton exists yet; 3-turn pilot was contingent on prior module implementation.

declared_losses.description: Assistant issued tool_use to read /home/tony/projects/hamutay/pyproject.toml (turn 123) but no result content has been integrated into tensor. The actual content of pyproject.toml is unknown; only the intent to read is recorded.
declared_losses.reason_for_loss: Tool result not yet delivered to tensor projector (tool_use issued, awaiting tool_result in next cycle).

open_questions: CRITICAL (cycle 40, still unresolved): Are there other JSONL files that contain actual conversation text? Check session/*.jsonl (e.g., session/d5da3c7a-3c3c-4047-a4ee-276be57567c1.jsonl) to see if field structure differs and includes full message text.

CRITICAL (cycle 40, still unresolved): LINE_COUNT: How many lines (turns) are in baseline_run1/logs/proxy_*.jsonl? Run: wc -l /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/logs/proxy_20260302_024551.jsonl. Estimated: 6-124 lines (3-62 turns).
CRITICAL (cycle 40, still unresolved): CONFIG_METADATA: What settings are in /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/config.json?
CRITICAL (cycle 40, still unresolved): TEST_METRICS: What baseline scores/metrics are in test_results.txt?
CRITICAL (cycle 40, still unresolved): SESSION_VS_LOGS: Is session/*.jsonl the processed/cleaned version of logs/proxy_*.jsonl, or a parallel record?
CYCLE 41 NEW: What is the hamutay project? Is it a dependency, related project, or parallel effort? Why the context shift from pichay in cycle 41?
CYCLE 41 NEW: What does /home/tony/projects/hamutay/pyproject.toml contain? (Tool use issued turn 123, awaiting tool_result.)
CYCLE 41 NEW: Is hamutay related to pichay? Does hamutay contain utilities, test data, or infrastructure that pichay depends on?
CYCLE 41 NEW: Should cycle 41 continue hamutay exploration, or resume pichay/projector work? What is the intended next priority?

CYCLE 41 DEPENDENCY: Full pichay projector implementation is blocked until: (1) hamutay context clarified, (2) line count obtained, (3) schema discovery completed (session vs logs), (4) config/test_results read. Which should be prioritized in cycle 41?
instructions_for_next:
[
  "CYCLE 41 CLARIFICATION (URGENT): Determine why hamutay project is being explored now. Is it: (A) a dependency for pichay projector? (B) a parallel project with different priority? (C) context for understanding the broader workspace? (D) user request to investigate? Check conversation context and explicitly state the reason.",
  "CYCLE 41: If hamutay is NOT a critical blocker for pichay, RESUME PICHAY PROJECTOR WORK. Get line count first: wc -l /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/logs/proxy_20260302_024551.jsonl. This unblocks all subsequent parser/extractor design.",
  "CYCLE 41: If hamutay IS a critical blocker, fully integrate hamutay discovery into tensor. Read: (1) hamutay/pyproject.toml (await tool_result from turn 123), (2) hamutay/README.md, (3) hamutay/main.py (head -20). Synthesize: what is hamutay's role in pichay/projector pipeline?",
  "CYCLE 41: RESUME SCHEMA DISCOVERY (high priority). Execute: head -2 /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/session/d5da3c7a-3c3c-4047-a4ee-276be57567c1.jsonl | jq . Compare field names vs logs schema. Document differences (if any) in schema_discovery.md.",
  "CYCLE 41: RESUME CONFIG/METADATA READS (high priority). Execute: (1) cat /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/config.json | jq . (2) cat /home/tony/projects/pichay/experiments/baseline_run1/test_results.txt. Extract: model, temperature, max_tokens, metrics. Document in design_notes.md.",
  "CYCLE 41: DECISION POINT (end of cycle 41): Either (A) hamutay discovery confirms it blocks pichay → integrate hamutay findings, then resume pichay projector build in cycle 42. OR (B) hamutay is independent → deprioritize hamutay, commit to full pichay projector MVP (parser + extractor + builder) completion by end of cycle 42.",
  "CYCLE 42 (contingent on cycle 41 resolution): Once line count, schema, and config are known, implement pairwise JSONL parser (src/pichay/projector/parser.py). Input: file path. Output: iterator of turn dicts. Test on first 3 turns.",
  "CYCLE 42 (contingent): Implement claim extractor heuristics. Apply rules: (a) if output_tokens >= 1000 → 'verbose_response' claim, (b) if cache_read > 0 → 'cache_efficiency' claim, (c) if input_tokens > 10000 → 'large_context' claim. Test on first 3 turns.",
  "CYCLE 42 (contingent): Implement strand assigner. Pre-define 3 strands: 'Conversation' (role-based), 'Efficiency' (tokens/cache), 'Reasoning' (response length). Map claims to strands via keyword matching. Test on first 3 turns.",
  "CYCLE 42 (contingent): Implement epistemic assigner. Rules: default 0.80 truth / 0.10 indeterminacy / 0.10 falsity. Adjust by heuristic: +0.05 truth if output_tokens > median, +0.05 truth if cache_read > 0. Test on 20+ sampled claims; verify sum ≈ 1.0.",
  "CYCLE 42 (contingent): Implement TensorRecord builder. Pydantic class with fields: id, cycle, strands, claims, declared_losses, open_questions, instructions_for_next, epistemic {truth, indeterminacy, falsity}. Test instantiation from first-turn data.",
  "CYCLE 42 (contingent): Run 3-turn integration test. Load turns 0-2 from proxy_*.jsonl. For turn N: call projector(tensor_{N-1}, turn_N) → tensor_N. Validate: (1) no crashes, (2) tensor is valid Pydantic, (3) ≥3 strands, (4) ≥5 claims, (5) declared_losses > 0. If PASS → green flag for full-file run.",
  "CYCLE 42-43 (contingent on 3-turn PASS): Scale projector to full JSONL file. Iterate all turns, accumulate tensor state. Emit final tensor to pickle/JSONL. Metrics: total_strands (expected 5-10), total_claims (expected 30-100), compression_ratio (expected 0.15-0.35).",
  "CYCLE 43 (contingent on full-file run): Acceptance checkpoint v2. Validate: (1) ≥95% of turns processed without error, (2) final strand count ∈ [3, 12], (3) total claims clustered by strand (3-7 per strand expected), (4) compression ratio 0.15-0.35 (stable across turns), (5) declared losses < 40% of original content. If PASS → freeze H0 projector, document design, proceed to Phase 1.5 (apply to all 15 runs).",
  "RESOURCE ALLOCATION (cycle 41-43): Hamutay discovery should take ≤20% of cycle 41 (clarification + 2-3 file reads). Remaining ≥80% resumes pichay projector work. If hamutay proves to be major blocker/dependency, transparently trade off: use 50% cycle 41 for hamutay, defer full pichay projector to cycle 42-43.",
  "DOCUMENTATION (cycle 41-43): Maintain cycle_40_artifacts/ folder in /home/tony/.claude/projects/pichay/memory/. Add: (1) cycle_41_hamutay_discovery.md (if relevant), (2) schema_discovery.md (updated with session/*.jsonl findings), (3) design_heuristics.md (finalized rules for claims/strands/epistemic), (4) projector_code.py (working modules), (5) 3turn_pilot_report.txt (from 3-turn test).",
  "MEMORY CHECKPOINT (cycle 41 end): Emit updated tensor (current cycle 41) with: (1) hamutay findings integrated (or explicitly deprioritized), (2) schema discovery status (done or blocked), (3) critical blockers resolved (line count, config, test_results) or acknowledged, (4) pichay projector work plan refined for cycle 42. Ensure open_questions is current (resolved questions removed) and declared_losses tracks what was learned but dropped."
]
